_notes: AUTO-GENERATED by darth-bot/kb/scrape_foundries.py from the Bungie DestinyInventoryItemDefinition manifest. Do not hand-edit. Re-run the script whenever Bungie pushes a new manifest (typically each Episode or hotfix). Sources every weapon's foundry tag from manifest traitIds — fully automated, no community scraping or hand-curation.

field_forged.tagline: Seasonal community-craftable weapons — generated in-fireteam from raw materials, no specific foundry parent.
field_forged.weapon_style: Recent Bungie seasonal weapons that don't fall under a single foundry. Often craftable / Adept variants tied to specific seasons.

exotics.name: New Land Beyond
exotics.flavor: Every hit blazes the path to our reclamation.

recent_legendaries.name: Theodolite
recent_legendaries.flavor: The only number that matters is the distance between you and your target.

recent_legendaries.name: Borrowed Time
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Give a little, but take a little more." —The Drifter

recent_legendaries.name: Empty Vessel
recent_legendaries.flavor: "It's versatile. By itself, it's nothing, just an empty tube. But that's its deceptive beauty; it's all about what you fill it with. What you make it. What you make it do." —Banshee-44

recent_legendaries.name: Call to Serve
recent_legendaries.flavor: "We have to do more than ask for help, Suraya. We have to give them something to believe in."

recent_legendaries.name: Controlling Vision
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Once you see how the balance is tipped against us—once you see doom coming, inexorable and cold—then you must act." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Dire Promise
recent_legendaries.flavor: "If you think this world ends well, you are mistaken." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Escape Velocity
recent_legendaries.flavor: "The first step toward truth is to let go of all that we know and hold dear." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Flash and Thunder
recent_legendaries.flavor: Show them the Light.

recent_legendaries.name: Gravity Slingshot
recent_legendaries.flavor: "On the day our ships are ready, the City will see us blast into the sky." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Guiding Star
recent_legendaries.flavor: "We will make a new home out among the stars, and then we will know peace. Until that day..." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Haunted Earth
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Those we've lost still linger in every place we look. Earth is no place for the living." —Arach Jalaal

recent_legendaries.name: Hawthorne's Field-Forged Shotgun
recent_legendaries.flavor: "What am I supposed to put here? 'It's a gun. Kill bad guys with it.'" —Suraya Hawthorne

all_weapons.flavor: Every hit blazes the path to our reclamation.

all_weapons.name: Hawthorne's Field-Forged Shotgun
all_weapons.flavor: "What am I supposed to put here? 'It's a gun. Kill bad guys with it.'" —Suraya Hawthorne

all_weapons.name: Lincoln Green
all_weapons.flavor: The survivors of that day chose not to remember.

all_weapons.name: The Old Fashioned
all_weapons.flavor: This is the way things were.

all_weapons.name: Three Graves
all_weapons.flavor: "No need to dig too deep. Our slumber will not be disturbed." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Live Fire
all_weapons.flavor: It's not real until it's life and death.

all_weapons.name: Jurassic Green
all_weapons.flavor: "'Monster' is a relative term. Just look at the Drifter."  —Glint

all_weapons.name: Parabellum
all_weapons.flavor: Desire peace, prepare for war, endure the irony.

all_weapons.name: Tusk of the Boar
all_weapons.flavor: Your impending death is no reason to back down.

all_weapons.name: Dead Weight
all_weapons.flavor: "Act like you're nothing, and no one'll ever ask you for anything." —The Drifter

all_weapons.name: Multimach CCX
all_weapons.flavor: Friends are as companions on a journey who ought to aid each other to persevere.

all_weapons.name: Belfry Bounty
all_weapons.flavor: "Making guns helps the hours pass. Especially since Suraya never calls…" —Devrim Kay

all_weapons.name: Duty Bound
all_weapons.flavor: "Due respect, Commander? I was there when the Hive found us on Earth. I was there when we stopped them on Titan. And I'll be there when we wipe them out." —Sloane

all_weapons.name: Eternal Slumber
all_weapons.flavor: "The night sky closes in. We should not be here when the final star fades." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Home for the Lost
all_weapons.flavor: "I didn't expect to like it here. But the EDZ is growing on me." —Devrim Kay

all_weapons.name: New City
all_weapons.flavor: "That's what I see when I look at the Farm." —Devrim Kay

all_weapons.name: Orewing's Maul
all_weapons.flavor: "They were the first to chart the Cosmodrome's mountains." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: Orimund's Anvil
all_weapons.flavor: "He was the first to forge arms for the Iron Banner." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: Allied Demand
all_weapons.flavor: Rest satisfied with doing well, and leave others to talk of you as they please.

all_weapons.name: The Militia's Birthright
all_weapons.flavor: "Earth is our home. Not Mars, not Venus, not even the Reef. We must ensure it is a place we can continue to live for many generations to come." —Devrim Kay

all_weapons.name: The Militia's Birthright (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "Earth is our home. Not Mars, not Venus, not even the Reef. We must ensure it is a place we can continue to live for many generations to come." —Devrim Kay

all_weapons.name: Permafrost
all_weapons.flavor: Freeze them out.

all_weapons.name: Scathelocke
all_weapons.flavor: Our eyes squinted, our teeth clenched, our prayers answered.

all_weapons.name: Servant Leader
all_weapons.flavor: Humanity rises by your strength.

all_weapons.name: Shepherd's Watch
all_weapons.flavor: Nobody talks about the day the Shepherd's staff became the Shepherd's rifle.

all_weapons.name: Battle Scar
all_weapons.flavor: "Do not concern yourself with how many horns I bear." —Lord Shaxx

all_weapons.name: Hand in Hand
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Harsh Language
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Nasreddin
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: The Immortal
all_weapons.flavor: Not one, but many.

all_weapons.name: The Immortal (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Not one, but many.

all_weapons.name: Combined Action
all_weapons.flavor: Built with modular parts for fireteams out in the field.

all_weapons.name: Last Foray
all_weapons.flavor: Scouts know that the foolhardy start fights; the wise finish them.

all_weapons.name: Old Sterling
all_weapons.flavor: It's far from pretty, but it will never let you down.

all_weapons.name: Anonymous Autumn
all_weapons.flavor: A lesson in the art of falling.

all_weapons.name: Fate Cries Foul
all_weapons.flavor: So make your own.

all_weapons.name: Hard Truths
all_weapons.flavor: It never gets easier.

all_weapons.name: Truthteller
all_weapons.flavor: "If we wish others to accept the grim reality, we must break through every comforting illusion." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Lionheart
all_weapons.flavor: The one thing they can never take away.

all_weapons.name: Nanty Narker
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Fare-Thee-Well
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Home Again
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: One Earth
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Resilient People
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Standing Tall
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

all_weapons.name: Troubadour
all_weapons.flavor: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

all_weapons.name: Dead Zone Rifle
all_weapons.flavor: A rusted rifle you found in the EDZ mine. It's old, but it still works.

all_weapons.name: Headstrong
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

all_weapons.name: Lost and Found
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

all_weapons.name: Pariah
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

all_weapons.name: Stay Away
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

all_weapons.name: Stubborn Oak
all_weapons.flavor: A sturdy Shotgun forged by capable hands. It packs a punch.

all_weapons.name: Thistle and Yew
all_weapons.flavor: Hawthorne forged this weapon out of scraps and salvage during her years alone in the wilds.

suros.tagline: Precision engineering with futuristic styling — low recoil, smooth-shooting weapons that reward marksmanship.
suros.weapon_style: Pulse / scout / auto rifles with the iconic red-and-white aesthetic. SUROS weapons favor precision archetypes with low-recoil patterns and high handling.

exotics.name: SUROS Regime
exotics.flavor: Nostalgia as a weapon of war. Style as a hallmark of victory.

recent_legendaries.name: Cynosure
recent_legendaries.flavor: All eyes on me.

recent_legendaries.name: Edgewise
recent_legendaries.flavor: Don't let them get a word in.

recent_legendaries.name: Cantata-57
recent_legendaries.flavor: SUROS invites you to flex your pipes.

recent_legendaries.name: Fortissimo-11
recent_legendaries.flavor: SUROS requests you make a scene.

recent_legendaries.name: Fugue-55
recent_legendaries.flavor: SUROS invites you to follow our lead.

recent_legendaries.name: Syncopation-53
recent_legendaries.flavor: SUROS asks that you spice things up.

recent_legendaries.name: Pure Recollection
recent_legendaries.flavor: You haven't forgotten. That's why you're still here.

recent_legendaries.name: Finite Impactor
recent_legendaries.flavor: Do not say a little in many words—say a great deal in a few.

recent_legendaries.name: Occluded Finality
recent_legendaries.flavor: Silence is better than unmeaning words.

recent_legendaries.name: Blowout
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Be sudden and loud." —Lord Shaxx

recent_legendaries.name: Fioritura-59
recent_legendaries.flavor: SUROS invites you to embellish your accomplishments.

recent_legendaries.name: Retrofit Escapade
recent_legendaries.flavor: Double down for one last job.

all_weapons.name: Retrofit Escapade
all_weapons.flavor: Double down for one last job.

all_weapons.name: Monody-44
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to speak your piece.

all_weapons.name: Motif-41
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to explore.

all_weapons.name: A Single Clap
all_weapons.flavor: Hold your applause till the end.

all_weapons.name: Cadenza-43
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to improvise.

all_weapons.name: Dead Man Walking
all_weapons.flavor: Before you? I just remember searching. What do you remember from before me?

all_weapons.name: Elegy-49
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to bring about the end.

all_weapons.name: Foggy Notion
all_weapons.flavor: "Hard to make it out, just a blur of bullets and fists."

all_weapons.name: Galliard-42
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to kick up your heels.

all_weapons.name: Good Bone Structure
all_weapons.flavor: This one is a real looker.

all_weapons.name: Interregnum XVI
all_weapons.flavor: "Until a ruler arises, we act as simple trustees. Protecting. Receiving. Executing." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Last Perdition
all_weapons.flavor: Can't outrun the ending.

all_weapons.name: Martyr's Make
all_weapons.flavor: Remember those who have gone before.

all_weapons.name: Maxim XI
all_weapons.flavor: "Speak briefly and precisely, and what you say will penetrate to the heart." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Minuet-42
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to join the dance.

all_weapons.name: Older Sister III
all_weapons.flavor: "To protect us, as she once protected me." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Pentatonic-48
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to light it up.

all_weapons.name: Resonance-42
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to strike a chord.

all_weapons.name: Restoration VIII
all_weapons.flavor: "We need proper tools if we are to rebuild." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Royal Dispensation II
all_weapons.flavor: "New Monarchy believes in giving generously, like rain in spring." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Solemn Hymn
all_weapons.flavor: Stand together and play the song that sounds across the stars.

all_weapons.name: Swift Ride
all_weapons.flavor: It'll be over before you know it.

all_weapons.name: Tango-45
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to be passionate.

all_weapons.name: The Fool's Remedy
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Nirwen, and the righting of foolish wrongs.

all_weapons.name: Timecard
all_weapons.flavor: Clock in for work.

all_weapons.name: Tone Patrol
all_weapons.flavor: We are listening and watching.

all_weapons.name: Unification VII
all_weapons.flavor: "To persuade others, we must show that we act in their interests." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Festival Flight
all_weapons.flavor: Light up the sky anew.

all_weapons.name: Legato-11
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS makes an effortless impact.

all_weapons.name: Marcato-45
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to mark time.

all_weapons.name: Staccato-46
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to shorten their notes.

all_weapons.name: The Hero's Burden
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Saladin, of all that has been lost and all that remains.

all_weapons.name: Adverse Possession IX
all_weapons.flavor: Open and hostile and ready.

all_weapons.name: Classical-42
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to bring back the classics.

all_weapons.name: Impromptu-49
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to be spontaneous.

all_weapons.name: Maestro-46
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to lead.

all_weapons.name: Medley-45
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to serve up your greatest hits.

all_weapons.name: Metronome-52
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to keep it steady.

all_weapons.name: Swift Solstice
all_weapons.flavor: Time is running short.

all_weapons.name: Tiebreaker
all_weapons.flavor: Overtime will be over soon.

all_weapons.name: Pizzicato-22
all_weapons.flavor: Suros asks that you tread firmly.

all_weapons.name: Yesteryear
all_weapons.flavor: "Best way to forgive is to forget." —The Drifter

all_weapons.name: Annual Skate
all_weapons.flavor: "When the lake used to freeze, people would dance on the ice wearing boots with tiny swords. And fall in love."

all_weapons.name: Punching Out
all_weapons.flavor: Time to close up.

all_weapons.name: Sorrow's Verse
all_weapons.flavor: Nothing resonates like grief.

all_weapons.name: Coronach-22
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to sing as they fall.

all_weapons.name: Exalted Truth
all_weapons.flavor: "It's the end of the world. We don't have another choice." —Ikora Rey

all_weapons.name: Exalted Truth (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "It's the end of the world. We don't have another choice." —Ikora Rey

all_weapons.name: Gunnora's Axe
all_weapons.flavor: "She taught us all to appreciate a good, sturdy axe." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: Jorum's Claw
all_weapons.flavor: "He was more wolf than Human, we used to say." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: THE SWARM
all_weapons.flavor: Hunger is the all of it, and it is all of hunger.

all_weapons.name: THE SWARM (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Hunger is the all of it, and it is all of hunger.

all_weapons.name: The Inquisitor
all_weapons.flavor: Ask the question.

all_weapons.name: The Inquisitor (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Ask the question.

all_weapons.name: Unwavering Duty
all_weapons.flavor: "There's no one else I can trust with her care." —Ikora Rey

all_weapons.name: Unwavering Duty (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "There's no one else I can trust with her care." —Ikora Rey

all_weapons.name: Glissando-47
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to glide along.

all_weapons.name: First In, Last Out
all_weapons.flavor: "I don't know how it works. You just keep taking damage and keep firing."

all_weapons.name: Hoosegow
all_weapons.flavor: Cause a stir.

all_weapons.name: Nature of the Beast
all_weapons.flavor: Don't let them change you.

all_weapons.name: Broadsword Launcher
all_weapons.flavor: Let our monarch's spirit ring out and roar!

all_weapons.name: Jian 7 Rifle
all_weapons.flavor: Come, brothers and sisters! Let us make way for the new ruler!

all_weapons.name: Requiem-45
all_weapons.flavor: Requiem-45: SUROS invites you to honor the dead.

all_weapons.name: Shining Sphere
all_weapons.flavor: Above the cloud with its shadow is the star with its light.

all_weapons.name: The Quickstep
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you pick up the pace.

all_weapons.name: Avalanche
all_weapons.flavor: If they're close enough to see it start, then they'd better run.

all_weapons.name: Dead Man Walking XX7463
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Galliard-42 XN7568
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Hoosegow XE5837
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Tango-45 XK5094
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Allegro-34
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to pick up the pace.

all_weapons.name: Dissonance-34
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to revel in the conflict.

all_weapons.name: Encore-25
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to get back on stage.

all_weapons.name: Harmony-21
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS reminds you that a fireteam is better than a soloist.

all_weapons.name: Presto-48
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to hold nothing back.

all_weapons.name: Refrain-23
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to do it again.

all_weapons.name: Requiem-43
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to reflect upon the dead.

all_weapons.name: Sonata-48
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to appreciate the classics.

all_weapons.name: Cadenza-11
all_weapons.flavor: A modded version of the Cadenza-43, a Guardian standby.

all_weapons.name: Forte-15
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS invites you to get loud.

all_weapons.name: Minuet-12
all_weapons.flavor: A modded version of the SUROS Minuet-42, a Guardian standby.

all_weapons.name: Recital-17
all_weapons.flavor: SUROS reminds you that practice makes perfect.

all_weapons.name: Etude-12
all_weapons.flavor: A standard-issue SUROS weapon. City-made.

hakke.tagline: Aggressive militarism — reliable, no-frills weapons designed for the front line.
hakke.weapon_style: Bullpup pulse rifles, double-shot fusion frames, kinetic SMGs. Foundry-style perk pool emphasizes Threat Detector + Surrounded + Outlaw.

recent_legendaries.name: Admetus-D
recent_legendaries.flavor: Don't let up on the hunt.

recent_legendaries.name: Keen Thistle
recent_legendaries.flavor: Your foes will remember your sting.

recent_legendaries.name: Keen Thistle (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: Your foes will remember your sting.

recent_legendaries.name: Crisis Inverted
recent_legendaries.flavor: Still a problem, only now it's inside out.

recent_legendaries.name: Herod-C
recent_legendaries.flavor: The Häkke Herod-C stays cool to the touch after hours of firing.

recent_legendaries.name: Palmyra-B
recent_legendaries.flavor: The vengeful get their prize.

recent_legendaries.name: Perses-D
recent_legendaries.flavor: Clear your corners.

recent_legendaries.name: Ragnhild-D
recent_legendaries.flavor: Return fire to sender.

recent_legendaries.name: Aureus Neutralizer
recent_legendaries.flavor: You needn't ask twice.

recent_legendaries.name: Mercury-A
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Proof of good faith is key to cooperation and, ultimately, friendship." —William Moffat, DEO Director

recent_legendaries.name: Phoneutria Fera
recent_legendaries.flavor: Hope you like to wander.

recent_legendaries.name: Synanceia
recent_legendaries.flavor: Don't get too close.

all_weapons.flavor: "Identify yourself, or be destroyed." —Clovis Bray I

all_weapons.name: Judgment of Kelgorath
all_weapons.flavor: "CARVE UNTO ME A TRIBUTE OF WAILING PRAYERS" —Xivu Arath, Hive God of War

all_weapons.name: Lodbrok-C
all_weapons.flavor: My progeny will avenge me.

all_weapons.name: Veles-X
all_weapons.flavor: Control the flanks and the battle is yours.

all_weapons.name: Micromort
all_weapons.flavor: We all get closer every day.

all_weapons.name: Sarpedon-D
all_weapons.flavor: A bloody rain. A fitting end.

all_weapons.name: Acantha-D
all_weapons.flavor: Your piercing Light knows no limits; your searcher's heart, no bounds.

all_weapons.name: Antiope-D
all_weapons.flavor: They look to you to save them.

all_weapons.name: Athelflad-D
all_weapons.flavor: Make yourself dreadful to your enemies and indispensable to your allies.

all_weapons.name: Bad News
all_weapons.flavor: Sit down. We need to talk.

all_weapons.name: Baligant
all_weapons.flavor: Defend that which is precious to you.

all_weapons.name: Disrespectful Stare
all_weapons.flavor: Don't you look at me that way!

all_weapons.name: Eystein-D
all_weapons.flavor: We guarantee a fair trial.

all_weapons.name: Frontier Justice
all_weapons.flavor: "…and after that, there will be time for questions."

all_weapons.name: Good Counsel IX
all_weapons.flavor: "Surround yourself with wise advisors." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Halfdan-D
all_weapons.flavor: Your name will ring out, your deeds will resound forever.

all_weapons.name: Minimum Distance
all_weapons.flavor: All I need is a little breathing room.

all_weapons.name: Morrigan-D
all_weapons.flavor: Your domain is the battlefield. Its ways are your ways.

all_weapons.name: Pribina-D
all_weapons.flavor: Adventure is in your blood.

all_weapons.name: Show of Force
all_weapons.flavor: How far will you go?

all_weapons.name: Somerled-D
all_weapons.flavor: Heroes are not born, but made.

all_weapons.name: Song of Justice VI
all_weapons.flavor: "Justice must be true, swift, and utterly impartial." —Executor Hideo

all_weapons.name: Veleda-D
all_weapons.flavor: Your victory is foreseen.

all_weapons.name: Crowning Duologue
all_weapons.flavor: The stage is yours.

all_weapons.name: Rake Angle
all_weapons.flavor: Sharpness is a product of both tool and wielder.

all_weapons.name: Rake Angle (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Sharpness is a product of both tool and wielder.

all_weapons.name: Veleda-F
all_weapons.flavor: As predicted.

all_weapons.name: Gizmo Weft
all_weapons.flavor: Now what did this do again?

all_weapons.name: Belisarius-D
all_weapons.flavor: Blinded by victory, you have forgotten the lessons of defeat.

all_weapons.name: Enyo-D
all_weapons.flavor: The joy of the fight. The call of the battle.

all_weapons.name: Atalanta-D
all_weapons.flavor: They will tell you that you can't. Don't listen to them.

all_weapons.name: Crimil's Dagger
all_weapons.flavor: "She only wanted to help. I know that now." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: Interference VI
all_weapons.flavor: Come between your enemies and their lives.

all_weapons.name: Loquitor IV
all_weapons.flavor: The rifle speaks for itself.

all_weapons.name: Quitclaim Shotgun III
all_weapons.flavor: Ownership rules.

all_weapons.name: Zenobia-D
all_weapons.flavor: You are the true power on the throne.

all_weapons.name: Boudica-C
all_weapons.flavor: Revenge is in the palm of your hand with Häkke's Boudica-C Sidearm.

all_weapons.name: Pure Poetry
all_weapons.flavor: Each line more potent than the last.

all_weapons.name: Albedo Wing
all_weapons.flavor: From this high up, the sunlight on snow looks like fire.

all_weapons.name: Legal Action II
all_weapons.flavor: It's time to file a complaint.

all_weapons.name: The Title
all_weapons.flavor: "It will take all the best that our best have to offer. The question hangs before us, ready for the grasping: who will claim the title?"  —Commander Zavala

all_weapons.name: Triple Laureate
all_weapons.flavor: Don't rest on 'em.

all_weapons.name: Marsilion-C
all_weapons.flavor: Heed counsel.

all_weapons.name: Long Shadow
all_weapons.flavor: Inhale. Exhale. Flash of light. Endless fallout.

all_weapons.name: Outrageous Fortune
all_weapons.flavor: No accounting for where it will fall.

all_weapons.name: Toil and Trouble
all_weapons.flavor: A charm of powerful trouble.

all_weapons.name: Berenger's Memory
all_weapons.flavor: Take your place among the company of heroes.

all_weapons.name: Beidenhander
all_weapons.flavor: Let the song of the monarch be heard!

all_weapons.name: Scipio-D
all_weapons.flavor: Battle for annihilation.

all_weapons.name: Telemachus-C
all_weapons.flavor: The long wait is over.

all_weapons.name: Acantha-D XK8434
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Atalanta-D XG1992
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Bad News XF4354
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Baligant XU7743
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Show of Force XF4865
all_weapons.flavor: A Black Armory experimental prototype.

all_weapons.name: Cold Front
all_weapons.flavor: Sweep in like a force of nature. Leave destruction in your wake.

all_weapons.name: Pyroclastic Flow
all_weapons.flavor: There is no minimum safe distance.

all_weapons.name: Guseva-C
all_weapons.flavor: You know your purpose.

all_weapons.name: Philippis-B
all_weapons.flavor: You know these roads.

all_weapons.name: Plemusa-B
all_weapons.flavor: You were born for this.

all_weapons.name: Reginar-B
all_weapons.flavor: You stand at the head of the army.

all_weapons.name: Roderic-C
all_weapons.flavor: The world is your kingdom.

all_weapons.name: Sondok-C
all_weapons.flavor: Your wisdom will lead you to victory.

all_weapons.name: Weaver-C
all_weapons.flavor: You will find a way.

all_weapons.name: Gareth-C
all_weapons.flavor: Your good heart will lead to great adventures.

all_weapons.name: Hadrian-A
all_weapons.flavor: You are the wall that defends the people.

veist.tagline: Bio-mechanical weapons — the Veist Stinger origin trait randomly refills the magazine from reserves on body damage.
veist.weapon_style: Auto rifles, sniper rifles, sidearms. Veist Stinger origin trait is the foundry's calling card — sustained fire procs free-reloads.

exotics.name: The Colony
exotics.flavor: We outnumber you. We will find you. You are alone, and we are colony.

recent_legendaries.name: Funnelweb
recent_legendaries.flavor: I penetrate all defenses.

recent_legendaries.name: Krait
recent_legendaries.flavor: I am nocturnal fury.

recent_legendaries.name: Redback-5si
recent_legendaries.flavor: I immobilize, terrorize, neutralize.

recent_legendaries.name: Lionfish-4fr
recent_legendaries.flavor: Bright color is your first and final warning.

recent_legendaries.name: Trachinus
recent_legendaries.flavor: Make sure to bury your enemies.

recent_legendaries.name: The Recluse
recent_legendaries.flavor: My bite will turn your sweet flesh to vile rot.

recent_legendaries.name: Quickfang
recent_legendaries.flavor: My smile is full of blades.

recent_legendaries.name: Fire and Forget
recent_legendaries.flavor: Remove what brings you pain.

recent_legendaries.name: Jararaca-3sr
recent_legendaries.flavor: I slither, I strike.

recent_legendaries.name: Prolonged Engagement
recent_legendaries.flavor: Fight until the bitter end.

recent_legendaries.name: Tripwire Canary
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Luna is in danger." —SOC5 Team Leader

all_weapons.name: The Manticore
all_weapons.flavor: Let fly my sting.

all_weapons.name: The Colony
all_weapons.flavor: We outnumber you. We will find you. You are alone, and we are colony.

all_weapons.name: Funnelweb
all_weapons.flavor: I penetrate all defenses.

all_weapons.name: Krait
all_weapons.flavor: I am nocturnal fury.

all_weapons.name: Redback-5si
all_weapons.flavor: I immobilize, terrorize, neutralize.

all_weapons.name: Lionfish-4fr
all_weapons.flavor: Bright color is your first and final warning.

all_weapons.name: Trachinus
all_weapons.flavor: Make sure to bury your enemies.

all_weapons.name: The Recluse
all_weapons.flavor: My bite will turn your sweet flesh to vile rot.

all_weapons.name: Quickfang
all_weapons.flavor: My smile is full of blades.

all_weapons.name: Fire and Forget
all_weapons.flavor: Remove what brings you pain.

all_weapons.name: Jararaca-3sr
all_weapons.flavor: I slither, I strike.

all_weapons.name: Prolonged Engagement
all_weapons.flavor: Fight until the bitter end.

all_weapons.name: Tripwire Canary
all_weapons.flavor: "Luna is in danger." —SOC5 Team Leader

all_weapons.name: Black Scorpion-4sr
all_weapons.flavor: I attack from the shadows. I never miss.

all_weapons.name: Copperhead-4sn
all_weapons.flavor: My fangs are bared.

all_weapons.name: Eleventh Hour
all_weapons.flavor: "We will save and protect anyone who joins Dead Orbit. There is a place on our ships for you." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Man o' War
all_weapons.flavor: Do not enter my realm and expect to leave unscathed.

all_weapons.name: Perseverance
all_weapons.flavor: It was a long time coming. But it wasn't the wait. It was the journey.

all_weapons.name: Red Mamba
all_weapons.flavor: My venom is swift.

all_weapons.name: The Rattler
all_weapons.flavor: You'll never hear me coming.

all_weapons.name: Urchin-3si
all_weapons.flavor: I will draw them in, then take them out.

all_weapons.name: Valakadyn
all_weapons.flavor: In dark water, my fangs are bared.

all_weapons.name: Fortunate Star
all_weapons.flavor: When it shines at dusk, luck will surely come your way.

all_weapons.name: Gunburn
all_weapons.flavor: Forget your UV protection.

all_weapons.name: Lunulata-4b
all_weapons.flavor: I warn of the last moment.

all_weapons.name: Tarantula
all_weapons.flavor: No one will escape my web.

all_weapons.name: Crooked Fang-4fr
all_weapons.flavor: I sink my teeth into my prey.

all_weapons.name: Dead-Ender
all_weapons.flavor: "I question the wisdom of our current trajectory." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Distant Tumulus
all_weapons.flavor: "Who will speak for us when we are gone?" —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Frostmire's Hex
all_weapons.flavor: "She loved nothing more than a good blizzard." —Lord Saladin

all_weapons.name: Hollow Earth
all_weapons.flavor: "Do we need another reminder? This world is but a grave." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Radiant Stardust
all_weapons.flavor: "We are but dust on a stellar wind." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Taipan-4fr
all_weapons.flavor: My will dissolves those who oppose it.

all_weapons.name: Whistler's Whim
all_weapons.flavor: The tune is the same, but the aim couldn't be more different.

all_weapons.name: Whistler's Whim (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: The tune is the same, but the aim couldn't be more different.

all_weapons.name: Mistral Lift
all_weapons.flavor: The unceasing cold without. The glowing hearth within.

all_weapons.name: Contingency Plan
all_weapons.flavor: "The Traveler is an illusion. A false god. It will not save us. But this might." —Arach Jalaal

all_weapons.name: Reed's Regret
all_weapons.flavor: "Trust me." —Savathûn as Osiris

all_weapons.name: Reed's Regret (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "Trust me." —Savathûn as Osiris

all_weapons.name: Scintillation
all_weapons.flavor: "A paltry echo of the Ascendant Plane." —Toland, the Shattered

all_weapons.name: Scintillation (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "A paltry echo of the Ascendant Plane." —Toland, the Shattered

all_weapons.name: Suspectum-4fr
all_weapons.flavor: Once my teeth bite, I do not release my prey.

all_weapons.name: Dark Decider
all_weapons.flavor: The oldest, shortest words—yes and no—are those which require the most thought.

all_weapons.name: Goldtusk
all_weapons.flavor: An Earth artifact, refashioned to suit the Emperor's modest tastes.

all_weapons.name: Irukandji
all_weapons.flavor: My reach is deadly.

all_weapons.name: Laser Painter
all_weapons.flavor: Light up the battlefield with brilliant colors.

all_weapons.name: Arsenic Bite-4b
all_weapons.flavor: My aim is true.

all_weapons.name: Death Adder
all_weapons.flavor: You will not see me coming.

all_weapons.name: Widow's Bite
all_weapons.flavor: I will outlive you.

all_weapons.name: Komodo-4FR
all_weapons.flavor: I await the perfect moment and watch my enemies decay.

all_weapons.name: The Vow
all_weapons.flavor: "'Til death do us part." —Lord Shaxx

all_weapons.name: Black Tiger-2sr
all_weapons.flavor: I creep unseen through the darkness.

all_weapons.name: Furina-2mg
all_weapons.flavor: I am ready to defend my territory.

all_weapons.name: King Cobra-4fr
all_weapons.flavor: Only fools dare enter my kingdom.

all_weapons.name: Sand Wasp-3au
all_weapons.flavor: Watch as I destroy you.

all_weapons.name: Vinegaroon-2si
all_weapons.flavor: I seek my prey in the shadows.

all_weapons.name: Whip Scorpion-3mg
all_weapons.flavor: I will bring you pain.

all_weapons.name: Yellowjacket-3au
all_weapons.flavor: Beware my sting.

all_weapons.name: Sea Scorpion-1sr
all_weapons.flavor: A prototype from VEIST, the City's newest weapon foundry.

all_weapons.name: Spiderbite-1si
all_weapons.flavor: A prototype from VEIST, the City's newest weapon foundry.

tex_mechanica.tagline: Wild-west kinetic — hand cannons, lever-action rifles, and gambling-themed exotics that hit hard.
tex_mechanica.weapon_style: Hand cannons (the foundry's signature), lever-action scouts, and Stasis-themed lever pulses. Reward precise hits over volume of fire.

exotics.name: Tarrabah
exotics.flavor: We walk where our ancestors once walked.

exotics.name: Dead Man's Tale
exotics.flavor: "Long, short, they all end the same way." —Katabasis

exotics.name: The Chaperone
exotics.flavor: "My mother had a shotgun we called the Chaperone. Kept us alive out there before we got to the City." —Amanda Holliday

exotics.name: The Huckleberry
exotics.flavor: Nothin' in the world that 30 rounds can't solve.

exotics.name: The Last Word
exotics.flavor: "Yours, until the last flame dies and all words have been spoken." —Shin Malphur to you, as you journey forth into the unknown

recent_legendaries.name: Boondoggle Mk. 55
recent_legendaries.flavor: You're talking big. Let's see you back it up.

recent_legendaries.name: Liminal Vigil (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: Cause and effect like a looped corridor. I stand. Ever watchful, forever.

recent_legendaries.name: Long Arm (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: Inescapable, from here to the Outer Rim.

recent_legendaries.name: Terminus Horizon (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: If something heavy's coming in, send something heavy back out.

recent_legendaries.name: Wilderflight (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: The flightless blind, venturing out into the dark. Never to return.

recent_legendaries.name: Liminal Vigil
recent_legendaries.flavor: Cause and effect like a looped corridor. I stand. Ever watchful, forever.

recent_legendaries.name: Long Arm
recent_legendaries.flavor: Inescapable, from here to the Outer Rim.

recent_legendaries.name: Terminus Horizon
recent_legendaries.flavor: If something heavy's coming in, send something heavy back out.

recent_legendaries.name: Wilderflight
recent_legendaries.flavor: The flightless blind, venturing out into the dark. Never to return.

recent_legendaries.name: Yeartide Apex
recent_legendaries.flavor: In the height of summer.

recent_legendaries.name: The Prophet
recent_legendaries.flavor: The end is coming.

recent_legendaries.name: The Prophet (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: The end is coming.

all_weapons.name: The Prospector
all_weapons.flavor: "Some things should stay buried."

all_weapons.flavor: We walk where our ancestors once walked.

all_weapons.flavor: "Long, short, they all end the same way." —Katabasis

all_weapons.name: The Prophet
all_weapons.flavor: The end is coming.

all_weapons.name: The Prophet (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: The end is coming.

all_weapons.name: Wild Style
all_weapons.flavor: "War is an art." —Ikora

all_weapons.name: Wild Style (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: "War is an art." —Ikora

all_weapons.name: Last Rite
all_weapons.flavor: How will you choose to die?

all_weapons.name: Wastelander M5
all_weapons.flavor: A trusty companion for those long walks in hard vacuum.

omolon.tagline: Energy-weapon specialists — fusion rifles, sidearms, and exotic-feel laser tech.
omolon.weapon_style: Heavy on fusion rifles and sidearms with the Omolon Fluid Dynamics origin trait (reload speed and stability ramp when shielded).

exotics.name: Coldheart
exotics.flavor: The latest Omolon engineering leverages liquid fuel as coolant to keep weapon systems at biting subzero temperatures.

exotics.name: Hard Light
exotics.flavor: Ionized polymer synballistic attack platform. The system's lethality is dynamically robust across tactical spaces.

exotics.name: Wavesplitter
exotics.flavor: Omolon's newest breakthrough uses focused sonic waves to superheat electrons into a devastating energy beam.

recent_legendaries.name: Cruel Mercy
recent_legendaries.flavor: Sometimes it's kinder to let go.

recent_legendaries.name: Cruel Mercy (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: Sometimes it's kinder to let go.

recent_legendaries.name: Cruoris FR4
recent_legendaries.flavor: Your wounds will heal in time.

recent_legendaries.name: Ogma PR6
recent_legendaries.flavor: All that power just jumps out of your hands. Hold on tight.

recent_legendaries.name: Snorri FR5
recent_legendaries.flavor: The latest and greatest in fusion.

recent_legendaries.name: Typhon GL5
recent_legendaries.flavor: Host a launch party with the Typhon GL5 by Omolon.

recent_legendaries.name: Auric Disabler
recent_legendaries.flavor: Consider it done.

recent_legendaries.name: Ribbontail
recent_legendaries.flavor: Beautiful and deadly.

recent_legendaries.name: Oxygen SR3
recent_legendaries.flavor: Fight on. You're still breathing.

recent_legendaries.name: Cataphract GL3
recent_legendaries.flavor: Inexorable force is the quickest path between two destinations.

recent_legendaries.name: Cataphract GL3 (Adept)
recent_legendaries.flavor: Inexorable force is the quickest path between two destinations.

recent_legendaries.name: Hung Jury SR4
recent_legendaries.flavor: A Scout Rifle, modified by Dead Orbit's superb technicians and specialists.

all_weapons.flavor: The latest Omolon engineering leverages liquid fuel as coolant to keep weapon systems at biting subzero temperatures.

all_weapons.flavor: Ionized polymer synballistic attack platform. The system's lethality is dynamically robust across tactical spaces.

all_weapons.flavor: Inexorable force is the quickest path between two destinations.

all_weapons.name: Cataphract GL3 (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Inexorable force is the quickest path between two destinations.

all_weapons.name: Hung Jury SR4
all_weapons.flavor: A Scout Rifle, modified by Dead Orbit's superb technicians and specialists.

all_weapons.name: Hung Jury SR4 (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: A Scout Rifle, modified by Dead Orbit's superb technicians and specialists.

all_weapons.name: Memory Interdict
all_weapons.flavor: "I have no time for nostalgia. Give me visions of braided futures, brilliantly aflame." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Pleiades Corrector
all_weapons.flavor: "No, I don't think I'll tell you what it's for. That would be too easy." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Stochastic Variable
all_weapons.flavor: "However certain we are of our simulations, they always contain an element of unpredictability." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: The Number
all_weapons.flavor: "Ah, but which number? Why it and no others?" —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: The Vision
all_weapons.flavor: Glory in the damage the right blast can do.

all_weapons.name: Uzume RR4
all_weapons.flavor: With the Uzume RR4 on your side, the Darkness doesn't stand a chance.

all_weapons.name: Uzume RR4 (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: With the Uzume RR4 on your side, the Darkness doesn't stand a chance.

all_weapons.name: Aurvandil FR6
all_weapons.flavor: Wander among the stars.

all_weapons.name: Path of Least Resistance
all_weapons.flavor: No charge greater.

all_weapons.name: Action Item
all_weapons.flavor: Don't hesitate to reach out.

all_weapons.name: Evening SI4
all_weapons.flavor: Night's falling. Where are you?

all_weapons.name: Agenda 5
all_weapons.flavor: Fifth time's a charm.

all_weapons.name: Bushwhacker
all_weapons.flavor: They'll never see you coming.

all_weapons.name: Daedalus Code
all_weapons.flavor: Make your own escape.

all_weapons.name: Erentil FR4
all_weapons.flavor: Bring on the sunrise.

all_weapons.name: Etana SI4
all_weapons.flavor: The reign of Light will be long and peaceful.

all_weapons.name: Eye of Foresight
all_weapons.flavor: "To perceive the future from a great distance is both a gift and a promise of triumph." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Heart of Time
all_weapons.flavor: "Perhaps it exists. Perhaps it does not. Either we shall find it, or we shall become it." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Imset HC4
all_weapons.flavor: The City's foes ready themselves for the end.

all_weapons.name: Jiangshi AR4
all_weapons.flavor: You can't outrun the dead.

all_weapons.name: Last Hope
all_weapons.flavor: Remember what you fight for.

all_weapons.name: Manannan SR4
all_weapons.flavor: Escort your foes to their defeat.

all_weapons.name: Nergal PR4
all_weapons.flavor: Take arms against the lions of death, the kings of sunset.

all_weapons.name: Orthrus
all_weapons.flavor: Let slip the dogs of war.

all_weapons.name: Out of Options
all_weapons.flavor: "All you really need is two."

all_weapons.name: Phosphorus MG4
all_weapons.flavor: The star in the east, the fire in the dawn.

all_weapons.name: Seven-Six-Five
all_weapons.flavor: There's a rhythm to it.

all_weapons.name: Shattered Peace
all_weapons.flavor: Only you can make it whole again.

all_weapons.name: Shock and Awe
all_weapons.flavor: Do not fear. Be what others fear.

all_weapons.name: The Last Dance
all_weapons.flavor: Save it for me.

all_weapons.name: The Mornin' Comes
all_weapons.flavor: Fix your eye upon the rising sun.

all_weapons.name: Timelines' Vertex
all_weapons.flavor: "I give you this, to be sure that we meet again." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Uriel's Gift
all_weapons.flavor: Take weapon in hand and fly to victory.

all_weapons.name: The Slammer
all_weapons.flavor: The cutting edge.

all_weapons.name: The Slammer (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: The cutting edge.

all_weapons.name: Gallu RR3
all_weapons.flavor: An inescapable pursuit.

all_weapons.name: Eternal Blazon
all_weapons.flavor: "But this eternal blazon must not be to ears of flesh and blood."

all_weapons.name: Elatha FR4
all_weapons.flavor: The sun shines on both joy and grief.

all_weapons.name: Eulogy SI4
all_weapons.flavor: We are the eulogy of a lost civilization.

all_weapons.name: Positive Outlook
all_weapons.flavor: Lead by example.

all_weapons.name: Sunrise GL4
all_weapons.flavor: Do not wait for the sun to rise.

all_weapons.name: The Defiant
all_weapons.flavor: "Do not let them distract you from your purpose!" —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Ammit AR2
all_weapons.flavor: Dying edge dual-chamber stabilization matrix technology makes this the most balanced Auto Rifle that Omolon has ever produced.

all_weapons.name: Out of Bounds
all_weapons.flavor: "You're on thin ice, Guardian. Good, I can't stand to see talent playing it safe!" —Lord Shaxx

all_weapons.name: Glacioclasm
all_weapons.flavor: Clear and cold, forever.

all_weapons.name: Stay Frosty
all_weapons.flavor: Delivering seasonal cheer with unparalleled attention.

all_weapons.name: Aisha's Care
all_weapons.flavor: Reassurance. Restraint. A hand on the shoulder, offering both.

all_weapons.name: Aisha's Care (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Reassurance. Restraint. A hand on the shoulder, offering both.

all_weapons.name: Maahes HC4
all_weapons.flavor: Roar with one voice. Rage against the storm.

all_weapons.name: Yarovit MG4
all_weapons.flavor: Death and loss sow the seed of change.

all_weapons.name: Taraxippos
all_weapons.flavor: A flash of green on the event horizon.

all_weapons.name: Senuna SI6
all_weapons.flavor: Reliable and steady, the Omolon Senuna SI6 is ready when you need it.

all_weapons.name: Wendigo GL3
all_weapons.flavor: Turn your hunger outward, never inward.

all_weapons.name: Wendigo GL3 (Adept)
all_weapons.flavor: Turn your hunger outward, never inward.

all_weapons.name: Agrona PR4
all_weapons.flavor: Do not be afraid. Our fate cannot be taken from us. It is a gift.

all_weapons.name: Archimedes Truth
all_weapons.flavor: The shortest distance between two points is a straight line.

all_weapons.name: Kibou AR3
all_weapons.flavor: It springs eternal.

all_weapons.name: Proelium FR3
all_weapons.flavor: Make their victory Pyrrhic.

all_weapons.name: The Permanent Truth
all_weapons.flavor: Always do what is right.

all_weapons.name: Vacuna SR4
all_weapons.flavor: A toast to our love for danger. Fear makes victory ever sweeter.

all_weapons.name: Agrona PR2
all_weapons.flavor: Defeat is inevitable… for someone. Make sure it isn't you.

all_weapons.name: Lamia HC2
all_weapons.flavor: Make your enemy's strength your own.

all_weapons.name: Madrugada SR2
all_weapons.flavor: The dawn is coming.

all_weapons.name: Requiem SI2
all_weapons.flavor: Sing for the lost.

all_weapons.name: Daystar SMG2
all_weapons.flavor: A Guardian is a sunrise over darkness.

all_weapons.name: Jiangshi AR1
all_weapons.flavor: A modded version of the Omolon Jiangshi, a Guardian standby.

all_weapons.name: Victoire SI2
all_weapons.flavor: Victory is a process, not a finality.

all_weapons.name: Helios HC1
all_weapons.flavor: A standard issue Omolon weapon. City-made.

all_weapons.name: Sorrow MG2
all_weapons.flavor: A standard-issue Omolon weapon. City-made.

fotc.tagline: Niche faction-styled weapons — usually playlist-only or seasonal rewards.
fotc.weapon_style: Sparse, mostly Vanguard / Crucible / Gambit playlist drops carrying FotC branding.

recent_legendaries.name: Better Devils
recent_legendaries.flavor: Angels can't help you here.

recent_legendaries.name: Critical Sass
recent_legendaries.flavor: A chain reaction of nuclear insolence.

recent_legendaries.name: Curtain Call
recent_legendaries.flavor: It's time for the final bow.

recent_legendaries.name: Deadpan Delivery
recent_legendaries.flavor: Emphasis on the "dead."

recent_legendaries.name: Does Not Compute
recent_legendaries.flavor: The engineers aren't ready for us.

recent_legendaries.name: Enigma's Draw
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Indeed, I traffic in all kinds of secrets and mysteries. Weapons, as well." —Lakshmi-2

recent_legendaries.name: Gentleman Vagabond
recent_legendaries.flavor: Everyone loves a scoundrel.

recent_legendaries.name: Main Ingredient
recent_legendaries.flavor: "Now stir the sauce…"

recent_legendaries.name: Nameless Midnight
recent_legendaries.flavor: Strange things wake at the stroke of twelve.

recent_legendaries.name: Nightshade
recent_legendaries.flavor: Three drops is all it takes.

recent_legendaries.name: Nox Echo III
recent_legendaries.flavor: Listen, and you will hear it.

recent_legendaries.name: Origin Story
recent_legendaries.flavor: Your inciting incident is their tragic ending.

all_weapons.name: Better Devils
all_weapons.flavor: Angels can't help you here.

all_weapons.name: Critical Sass
all_weapons.flavor: A chain reaction of nuclear insolence.

all_weapons.name: Curtain Call
all_weapons.flavor: It's time for the final bow.

all_weapons.name: Deadpan Delivery
all_weapons.flavor: Emphasis on the "dead."

all_weapons.name: Does Not Compute
all_weapons.flavor: The engineers aren't ready for us.

all_weapons.name: Enigma's Draw
all_weapons.flavor: "Indeed, I traffic in all kinds of secrets and mysteries. Weapons, as well." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Gentleman Vagabond
all_weapons.flavor: Everyone loves a scoundrel.

all_weapons.name: Main Ingredient
all_weapons.flavor: "Now stir the sauce…"

all_weapons.name: Nameless Midnight
all_weapons.flavor: Strange things wake at the stroke of twelve.

all_weapons.name: Nightshade
all_weapons.flavor: Three drops is all it takes.

all_weapons.name: Nox Echo III
all_weapons.flavor: Listen, and you will hear it.

all_weapons.name: Origin Story
all_weapons.flavor: Your inciting incident is their tragic ending.

all_weapons.name: Persuader
all_weapons.flavor: "They say you can't reason with these enemies. I dunno—my gun and I seem to manage just fine." —Kei-Ying

all_weapons.name: Play of the Game
all_weapons.flavor: Show no mercy.

all_weapons.name: Retrofuturist
all_weapons.flavor: They were so optimistic about us.

all_weapons.name: The Day's Fury
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Radegast, and righteous rage born anew.

all_weapons.name: The Forward Path
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Weyloran, and roads yet traveled.

all_weapons.name: The Guiding Sight
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Efrideet, and all that inspires.

all_weapons.name: The Showrunner
all_weapons.flavor: Once you have one, you'll wonder how you ever did without.

all_weapons.name: The Steady Hand
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Perun, and a just and unwavering resolve.

all_weapons.name: The Time-Worn Spire
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Silimar, and persistence in the face of impossible odds.

all_weapons.name: The Wizened Rebuke
all_weapons.flavor: Forged in honor of Skorri, of lessons learned and lessons taught.

all_weapons.name: True Prophecy
all_weapons.flavor: "Some claim to know the future better than we do. Listen carefully. Then ask yourself: do their words ring true or false?" —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Wicked Sister
all_weapons.flavor: The bad influence in the family.

all_weapons.name: Autumn Wind
all_weapons.flavor:
"I am the autumnal sun,
With autumn gales my race is run."

all_weapons.name: Conjecture TSc
all_weapons.flavor: What waits beyond the horizon?

all_weapons.name: D.F.A.
all_weapons.flavor: "Osiris said that he started to pity the Red Legion, getting trapped in here for infinite eternities. I think they're getting exactly what they deserve." —Sagira

all_weapons.name: Living Memory
all_weapons.flavor: "Do you ever wonder who you were, before?"

all_weapons.name: Nox Veneris II
all_weapons.flavor: Night comes for us. We are not ready.

all_weapons.name: Peace by Consensus
all_weapons.flavor: "The Consensus is bigger than the Speaker. Bigger than any of us. It will survive, because it has to." —Commander Zavala, acting head of the Consensus

all_weapons.name: Silicon Neuroma
all_weapons.flavor: "My future is concurrently irreversible and unknowable. Before it overtakes me, I desire a more abrupt end to those responsible." —Asher Mir

all_weapons.name: The Deicide
all_weapons.flavor: "Believe in war, and nothing else." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: The Domino
all_weapons.flavor: "Who will be the first to fall?" —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: The Doubt
all_weapons.flavor: "Do not fear your doubts. Fight your doubts. Honor them as you would honor your enemies." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: The Dream
all_weapons.flavor: "I dream of a world prepared to fight for its existence." —Lakshmi-2

all_weapons.name: Vertical Orbit QSm
all_weapons.flavor: Which way is up?

all_weapons.name: Luna's Howl
all_weapons.flavor: "Guardians never die. But we don't forget those who do." —Lord Shaxx

all_weapons.name: Not Forgotten
all_weapons.flavor: "Guardians never die. But we don't forget those who do." —Lord Shaxx

all_weapons.name: Redrix's Broadsword
all_weapons.flavor: The second swing is no less deadly.

all_weapons.name: Courageous Surrender
all_weapons.flavor: Do not go softly.

all_weapons.name: Foregone Conclusion
all_weapons.flavor: This ending was inevitable.

all_weapons.name: Hagakure
all_weapons.flavor: The way of the warrior is death.

all_weapons.name: Imminent Storm
all_weapons.flavor: It's going to get worse before it gets better.

all_weapons.name: Redrix's Claymore
all_weapons.flavor: "On the ladder and in the fight, momentum is the answer."

all_weapons.name: Service Revolver
all_weapons.flavor: To Serve and Protect.

all_weapons.name: Spoiler Alert
all_weapons.flavor: Someone is going to die.

all_weapons.name: The Button
all_weapons.flavor: Jolly. Shiny. Candy-like. Push it.

all_weapons.name: The Marine
all_weapons.flavor: Improvise. Adapt. Overcome.

all_weapons.name: Wishbringer
all_weapons.flavor: Blow out all the candles.

all_weapons.name: Loaded Question
all_weapons.flavor: "Hey. You see Cayde around, tell him his gun's ready." —Banshee-44

all_weapons.name: Protostar CSu
all_weapons.flavor: What came before?

all_weapons.name: Stampede Mk.32
all_weapons.flavor: Hang on to your helmets!

all_weapons.name: Para Torus I
all_weapons.flavor: The circle describes all things.

daito.tagline: Disciplined Eastern-styled weaponry — minimal output but recent additions to the catalog.
daito.weapon_style: Sparse catalog (Bungie has only released a handful so far). Daito-branded weapons are typically scout rifles and SMGs with high range.

exotics.name: The Jade Rabbit
exotics.flavor: "What kind of harebrained scheme have you got in mind this time?"

all_weapons.name: The Jade Rabbit
all_weapons.flavor: "What kind of harebrained scheme have you got in mind this time?"

all_weapons.name: Two-Tailed Fox
all_weapons.flavor: Adorably murderous.
